capabilities: Implement a logging strategy that integrates evaluation metrics and validation steps to enhance observability and system performance.

procedure.action: Initialize log levels using a centralized logging framework like ELK Stack to capture DEBUG, INFO, WARN, and ERROR logs by loading environment-specific values from config file; assert all required keys are present via config_validate(); assert config_validation_error_count < 1.
Instrument code with structured logging using JSON format to ensure logs are machine-readable and easily parsed.

Set up log aggregation and analysis using a tool like Splunk or Graylog to monitor log patterns and anomalies using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Specify key performance indicators (KPIs) such as error rate and log volume growth, and track them using Grafana dashboards.

Invoke alerting rules in Prometheus to notify when error logs exceed a threshold of 100 occurrences per minute following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

summary: Establish a robust logging strategy by integrating evaluation metrics and validation steps to ensure effective observability in software systems.
title: Logging Strategy Evaluation with Agent Planning

failureConditions: Logs become too verbose, leading to storage overflow.
Critical errors are missed due to improper log level configuration.

Log analysis tools fail to parse unstructured logs; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Alert fatigue from excessive false positives; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: all required keys are present via config_validate()
test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
successConditions: Verify that log parsing success rate is above 95% using a sample of 1000 logs; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure alert accuracy by maintaining a false positive rate below 5%; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Confirm that log storage usage does not exceed 80% capacity over a 30-day period; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Validate that all critical errors are logged with appropriate context; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
